letter_text:
State of California
Franchise Tax Board
Notice of Tax Return Change - Balance Due
Taxable Year 2024

We changed your California income tax return because of a math error in the amount of tax withheld. As a result, you have a balance due.

Balance due: $312.45
Pay by: February 28, 2026

To avoid additional penalties and interest, pay the amount due by the date above. You can pay online at ftb.ca.gov, by mail using the enclosed voucher, or by phone. If you believe this change is wrong, call the number on this notice.
